metadata.description: On-device vision capture MCP for Cortex (macOS, Apple Vision)

plugins.name: cortex-vision
plugins.description: On-device vision capture MCP for Cortex (macOS). Grabs an image (screen, file, or camera), runs an on-device Apple Vision task (OCR, scene labels, or barcodes), classifies the extracted text as a recall query or a memory, and returns it plus a routing hint to the Cortex MCP. Eyes-only: never reads or writes memories itself.
plugins.runtime_notes: macOS only. Requires swiftc (Xcode CLT). Camera frames need Camera permission; screen capture needs Screen Recording permission (System Settings — cannot be auto-granted).
